Bikaner's Trusted ENT Super-Specialty Hospital

Advanced ENT Care,
Close to Home

Expert diagnosis and treatment for ear, nose, throat, thyroid, and sleep disorders. Trusted by families across Rajasthan for over 25 years.

25+ Years
10,000+ Patients

"Best ENT specialist in Bikaner. Diagnosed my issue in the very first visit."

— Ramesh K., Bikaner
We treat →
👂 Ear & Hearing 👃 Nose & Allergy 🗣️ Throat & Voice 😵 Vertigo & Balance 😴 Snoring & Sleep Apnea 🦋 Thyroid 🎗️ Head & Neck Cancer

Why patients choose us

We're not a general hospital. We do one thing — ENT — and we do it better than anyone else in the region.

🏥

Only ENT Super-Specialty in Bikaner

Focused expertise, not a general hospital with an ENT ward.

🔬

Advanced Microsurgery Equipment

Endoscopic and laser procedures not available elsewhere in the region.

👨‍⚕️

Senior Specialists, Every Visit

You see a consultant — not a junior doctor — at every appointment.

📅

Same-Day Appointments

No waiting weeks. Slots available 6 days a week including evenings.

Our Treatments

Each treatment is performed by a specialist with deep experience in that condition.

👂

Ear, Nose & Throat Disorders

Advanced diagnosis and treatment for all ENT conditions using endoscopic techniques.
😵

Vertigo & Balance Disorders

Precise assessment and targeted treatment to restore stability and quality of life.
🤧

Allergy Testing & Relief

Comprehensive allergy testing with personalised treatment plans.
😴

Snoring & Sleep Apnea

Modern therapies for sleep-disordered breathing to improve sleep quality.
🦋

Thyroid Evaluation & Management

Accurate diagnosis and tailored treatment for all thyroid disorders.
🎗️

Head & Neck Cancer

Multidisciplinary approach with early detection and patient-centred care.
🔊

Hearing Examinations & Audiology

Comprehensive hearing assessments and advanced audiology services including hearing aids.

Meet our specialists

Qualified, experienced, and dedicated to getting you the right diagnosis the first time.

Dr. Rakesh Rawat

MBBS, MS (Bikaner)

ENT & Head & Neck Surgery 🕐 Mon–Sat · 10am–2pm · Wed off

Dr. Sharad Rawat

MBBS, MS (ENT & Head & Neck Cancer)

Head & Neck Cancer 🕐 Mon–Sat · 5pm–7pm · Sun off

Dr. Madhubani

MBBS, DORL (ENT), Pune

ENT Specialist 🕐 Mon–Sat · 10am–2pm · Sun off

Dr. Dhanpat Daga

Anaesthesiologist

Anaesthesiology 🕐 By appointment

What our patients say

Real patients, real outcomes. Every review is verified.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

"Dr. Rakesh diagnosed my chronic ear problem in the first visit after years of misdiagnosis elsewhere. Life-changing treatment."

Ramesh K. Chronic otitis media · Bikaner
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

"Best ENT hospital in Rajasthan. Staff is polite, facility is clean, and the doctors are genuinely thorough."

Sunita M. Sinus & allergy treatment · Jodhpur
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

"My vertigo was completely cured in 3 sessions. I had given up hope — so grateful to Dr. Madhubani."

Pooja S. Vertigo & balance disorder · Bikaner

Advanced facilities

Modern equipment enables accurate diagnosis and minimally invasive treatment.

🔭

Endoscopic Suite

HD endoscopy for nose, throat and ear — minimally invasive, precise diagnosis.

🔊

Audiology Lab

Full hearing assessment, audiometry, and hearing aid fitting services.

⚡

Laser Surgical Unit

Laser procedures for throat and nasal conditions — faster recovery, less pain.

🏨

Day Care & Recovery

Most procedures done as day care — no overnight stay required in most cases.

📅

Ready to book your appointment?

Slots available 6 days a week. Same-day appointments often available. Call or book online.

📞 Call Us

Our facility

A modern, comfortable environment designed around patient care.

Book your appointment today

Take the first step toward expert care. Appointments available Monday – Saturday.

📞 Call Us
RAWAT HOSPITAL

Rawat Hospital offers expert care for ENT issues like ear, nose, and throat allergies, sinuses, and hearing loss. We provide advanced treatment for head & neck cancer.

Rawat Hospital, C-24, Shastri Nagar,
Gate No. 3, Near Pawanpuri,
Bikaner, Rajasthan 334003
